$comment: scripts/LancesRoom.asm LanceShowOrHideEntranceBlocks — the static .blk ships the doorway into LANCE's hall CLOSED (0x72/0x73 at blocks (2,6)/(3,6)); every load opens it (0x31/0x32) until EVENT_LANCES_ROOM_LOCK_DOOR is set. Without this load hook the whole hall — LANCE, the CHAMPION and the HALL OF FAME — is walled off (gh #88).
